recommendations.title: Krrish 3
recommendations.overview: Krrish and his father must team up to save the world from a psychokinetic evil man named Kaal and his army of mutants.

recommendations.title: Koi... Mil Gaya
recommendations.overview: A developmentally disabled boy's life changes after he encounters an extraterrestrial being.

recommendations.title: Karan Arjun
recommendations.overview: Karan and Arjun reincarnate in the different parts of the country. But the faith of their previous mother brings them together in order to avenge their death.

recommendations.title: Kaho Naa... Pyaar Hai
recommendations.overview: Sonia and Rohit love each other but Rohit is mysteriously killed. When Sonia moves to New Zealand, she meets Raj, Rohit's lookalike who helps her trace Rohit's killer.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man
recommendations.overview: After being bitten by a genetically altered spider at Oscorp, nerdy but endearing high school student Peter Parker is endowed with amazing powers to become the superhero known as Spider-Man.

recommendations.title: Rendel
recommendations.overview: Rendel, a masked superhero, becomes blinded by his desire for revenge against a sinister criminal organization.

recommendations.title: X-Men
recommendations.overview: Two mutants, Rogue and Wolverine, come to a private academy for their kind whose resident superhero team, the X-Men, must oppose a terrorist organization with similar powers.

recommendations.title: GANTZ:O
recommendations.overview: After being brutally murdered in a subway station, a teen boy awakens to find himself resurrected by a strange computer named Gantz, and forced to fight a large force of invading aliens in Osaka.

recommendations.title: The Thundermans Return
recommendations.overview: Twins Phoebe and Max are enjoying their superhero lifestyle, but when one 'save' goes awry, the Thundermans are sent back to Hiddenville. While Hank and Barb enjoy their return, and Billy and Nora look forward to a normal high school life, Max and Ph

recommendations.title: My Brother Chases Dinosaurs
recommendations.overview: As a child, Jack believed the tender lie his parents told him, that Gio was a special being with superpowers, as in a comic book. Now that he is about to go to high school, however, Jack no longer believes that his brother is a superhero, in fact, he
